message_text: This is our third complaint. The replacement equipment arrived late and still does not work.
I will confirm the escalation outcome by Tuesday.
Tuesday passed with no update. We are comparing a competitor and may cancel at renewal.
Usage has fallen and the current package price is difficult to justify for our budget.
Please resolve the billing complaint, but do not send any marketing messages.
Please send service information by email because this account has no working mobile number.
Our clinics paused the rollout and there is no confirmed restart date.
The issue is resolved, the support team followed up, and our next order has been placed.
The rollout is successful. Please show us the approved analytics and portal expansion options.
Please send the current account statement for our records.
Everything is operating as expected and no follow-up is needed today.
